zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol於1298年出生在奧地利亞特可拉根福特 阿姆 額特黑瑟時，她的父親Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain37歲，母親Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica17歲。她和Peter II of Sicily-Aragon至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1352年在義大利西西利亞卡坦尼亞享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kärnten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erhardt, Ernst, Hans, Helmut, Horst, Klaus, Orlo, Siegfried.
North German and Dutch: variant of   Carsten  , itself a variant of   Christian  .

variants.name: Kasten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Kurt, Aloysius, Armin, Arno, Dietrich, Eldor, Ernst, Klaus, Otto, Wilhelm.
North German, East Frisian, North Frisian, and Dutch: from a vernacular variant of the personal name   Karsten  .

German: from Middle High German kasten ‘chest, coffer’ or kornkasten ‘grain bin’, hence a metonymic occupational name for the manager of a granary, and later for the treasurer of an estate or guild. See also Kastner .

variants.name: Carsten
meanings: North German and Dutch: from the personal name Carsten, a variant of Christian . In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the variant Karsten .

variants.name: Karstens
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Michel, Vernice.
North German, Dutch, and Danish: patronymic from   Karsten  . Compare   Carstens  .

nameMeanings.name: und
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Runte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erhard.

German: in the northwest of Germany most probably a topographic name from a field name based on run ‘mud’, which gave rise to several placenames in the Rhine-Ruhr area, for example Runten, Runtenberg, Rünthe near Hamm, Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol was born in 1298, in Klagenfurt am Wörthersee, Carinthia, Austria, her father, Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain, was 37 and her mother, Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica, was 17. She had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Peter II of Sicily-Aragon. She died in 1352, in Catania, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol est née en 1298, à Klagenfurt am Wörthersee, Kärnten, Autriche, son père, Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Peter II of Sicily-Aragon. Elle est décédée en 1352, à Catania, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol 1298 in Klagenfurt am Wörthersee, Kärnten, Österreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain 37 und ihre Mutter Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica 17. Sie hatte mit Peter II of Sicily-Aragon mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1352 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Catania, Sizilien, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol è nata il nel 1298 nel Klagenfurt am Wörthersee, Carinzia, Austria, sua padre, Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Peter II of Sicily-Aragon. Morì nel 1352, nel Catania, Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirolが1298年にオーストリアクaルンテンクラジェンファート アム ウoルスエルセで生まれた時，父Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krainは37歳，母Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnicaは17歳であった。彼女はPeter II of Sicily-Aragonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1352年にイタリアシシリアカタニアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol(이)가 1298년 오스트리아 ka른텐 클라겐퍼트 아 wo르더시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Peter II of Sicily-Aragon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 이탈리아 시실리야 카탠이아에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol nasceu em 1298, em Klagenfurt am Wörthersee, Kärnten, Áustria, seu pai, Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Peter II of Sicily-Aragon. Ela faleceu em 1352, em Catania, Sicilia, Itália, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol родилась в 1298 г. в местности кладженфурт ам вoртирси, кaрнтен, Австрия, её отцу по имени Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Peter II of Sicily-Aragon. Она умерла в 1352 г. в местности катаня, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Meinhardin von Kärnten und Tirol nació en 1298, en Klagenfurt am Wörthersee, Kärnten, Austria, su papá, Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Peter II of Sicily-Aragon. Murió en 1352, en Catania, Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 54 años.
